data.title: OneMedNet Establishes Standby Equity Funding Agreement
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from OneMedNet ( (ONMD) ).

On July 1, 2026, OneMedNet Corporation entered into a standby equity purchase agreement with YA II PN, Ltd., giving the company the option to sell up to $25 million of its common stock over a 36‑month term after a resale registration statement becomes effective. Each advance is priced at 97% of market price, capped per draw by trading volume and a 500,000‑share floor, and subject to ownership limits preventing Yorkville from exceeding 4.99% beneficial ownership and an overall 19.99% exchange cap unless shareholders approve higher issuances.

The arrangement requires OneMedNet to file and maintain an effective resale registration statement before it can request advances, giving the company a flexible, pre‑committed equity funding source that can be tapped over time. This structure offers incremental access to capital while limiting dilution through minimum price settings and regulatory caps, balancing liquidity needs against shareholder protection and market constraints.

More about OneMedNet

OneMedNet Corporation is a Delaware-based company whose common stock is publicly traded, with 56,952,652 shares outstanding as of June 30, 2026. The company issues common stock with a par value of $0.0001 per share and is utilizing structured equity financing arrangements to support its capital needs and shareholder-approved issuance limits.

Average Trading Volume: 554,478

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $38.7M

Eos Energy Enterprises ( (EOSE) ) has shared an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, Eos Energy Enterprises issued 13,683,634 shares of common stock and 6,004,378 accompanying warrants in a registered direct offering to Hudson Bay Master Fund Ltd., with each share sold together with 0.4388 of a warrant at an aggregate price of $5.481. The transaction, conducted under an effective shelf registration, provides the company with additional equity capital while potentially diluting existing shareholders over time.

In connection with the offering, Eos entered into a warrant agreement on June 30, 2026, with Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Company governing warrants exercisable at $5.481 per share for up to 10 years. The warrants include standard anti-dilution protections and can be exercised for cash or on a cashless basis, giving the investor future voting rights and economic exposure upon conversion, and further shaping the company’s capital structure depending on exercise behavior.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.

Safe Bulkers ( (SB) ) has provided an update.

On July 1, 2026, Monaco-based Safe Bulkers, Inc. announced that its board declared a cash dividend of $0.50 per share on both its 8.00% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares and its 8.00% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares, covering the period from April 30, 2026, to July 29, 2026. The dividends are scheduled to be paid on July 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 17, 2026, underscoring ongoing capital returns to preferred investors while the company notes that any future dividend decisions will depend on earnings, liquidity, fleet strategy, legal constraints and broader market conditions.

Dividends on both preferred series are structured to be payable quarterly in arrears on the 30th day of January, April, July and October, or on the next business day if that date falls on a weekend or public holiday. By reaffirming its preferred dividend policy, Safe Bulkers signals continued financial discipline and commitment to its capital structure, while emphasizing that future payouts remain at the board’s discretion and subject to operational performance and macroeconomic factors affecting the drybulk shipping market.

The score is driven primarily by solid but cyclical financials (weaker margins/ROE and uneven free cash flow) and a constructive earnings-call outlook supported by improving operational metrics and strong liquidity/backlog. Technicals are mildly weak near-term, while valuation is moderate with a supportive dividend yield.

The company’s common stock is dual-listed on the NYSE and Euronext Athens under the symbol SB, while its Series C and Series D preferred shares trade on the NYSE as SB.PR.C and SB.PR.D, respectively.

data.description:

An update from Telefonica Brasil ( (VIV) ) is now available.

On July 1, 2026, Telefônica Brasil announced that its indirectly controlled subsidiary Telefônica Infraestrutura e Segurança (TIS) merged its wholly owned unit Telefônica Cibersegurança e Tecnologia do Brasil (Cyberco Brasil), dissolving the latter. The transaction was executed at book value and left TIS’s share capital and Telefônica Brasil’s indirect equity stake unchanged.

The reorganization is aimed at simplifying operating structures, cutting costs tied to overlapping operations, and capturing internal synergies in the group’s cybersecurity and infrastructure businesses. Following the merger, TIS assumed all of Cyberco Brasil’s assets, liabilities, rights, and obligations, signaling a streamlining move designed to bolster operational efficiency without altering ownership for shareholders.

data.description:

An update from SMX Public Limited Company ( (SMX) ) is now available.

SMX (Security Matters) Public Limited Company filed an updated set of audited consolidated financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025, on July 1, 2026, to reflect its recent capital actions. The update restates prior share data to give effect to two reverse stock splits, a 20-for-1 split effective May 11, 2026, and a 2.285-for-1 split effective June 1, 2026, aligning historical financial presentation with the company’s current share structure.

The filing, which is now incorporated into several of the company’s existing SEC registration statements, also carries a going-concern warning from auditor Ziv Haft, a BDO member firm, highlighting SMX’s recurring losses, negative operating cash flows and reliance on external financing. This underscores continuing financial pressures on the security-tech company and signals ongoing risk for shareholders and creditors despite a bolstered cash position of $12.2 million at year-end 2025 and a modest reduction in total liabilities compared with 2024.

More about SMX Public Limited Company

SMX (Security Matters) Public Limited Company is an Ireland-based technology firm focused on security and traceability solutions, with operations reported under International Financial Reporting Standards. The company, which has been funded largely through equity, warrants and convertible notes, has accumulated losses of $251 million as of December 31, 2025, raising substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern, according to its independent auditor.

The latest announcement is out from Grab ( (GRAB) ).

Grab Holdings Limited has completed the acquisition of 100% of Stash Financial, Inc., a U.S. digital financial services company, marking a significant step in its push deeper into global fintech. The deal closed on July 1, 2026, with Grab paying for a 50.1% equity stake at closing and agreeing to pay fair market value for the remaining shares over the next three years, a structure that spreads its capital outlay while securing immediate control of Stash’s platform and customer base.

By bringing Stash fully under its ownership, Grab gains a foothold in the U.S. digital finance market that could complement its existing financial services offerings in Southeast Asia. The staggered payment arrangement may help manage balance-sheet impact while enabling Grab to integrate Stash’s technology and products, potentially strengthening its long-term competitive position in consumer fintech and offering expanded opportunities for cross-market product development.

data.title: Range Impact launches AI data center joint venture
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Range Impact ( (RNGE) ).

On July 1, 2026, Range Impact’s subsidiary Range Sky View Land, LLC and Time Complexity WV, LLC formed a 50/50 joint venture, Time Complexity Appalachia, LLC, to develop a power generation and data center facility on Range Impact’s 9,000‑acre Fola Mine Complex in West Virginia. The venture will be governed by a three‑member board with equal appointments from both partners, with key corporate actions requiring unanimous approval and profits distributed pro rata.

To support the partnership, Range Impact issued Time Complexity WV a seven‑year warrant on July 1, 2026 to purchase up to 14.5 million RNGE shares at $0.40, vesting in thirds upon state support, an independent feasibility report and execution of binding project agreements, or fully upon an early commercialization milestone. Range Sky also granted the joint venture an option to enter a long‑term, triple‑net ground lease and potential land purchase at the Fola site, positioning the former mine as a large‑scale AI and hyperscale computing corridor with extensive land, mineral, rail, road and water infrastructure.

Management from both firms framed the deal as a pivotal step in repurposing legacy industrial assets to meet surging demand for power‑hungry AI infrastructure while drawing institutional capital, technology tenants and engineering partners to Appalachia. The structure of the warrant, lease option and governance framework signals a capital‑efficient, risk‑shared approach that could materially reshape Range Impact’s asset base and create new revenue streams if the project advances through feasibility, state backing and commercialization milestones.

Spark’s Take on RNGE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RNGE is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong technical strength (clear uptrend with positive momentum) and improved balance-sheet positioning, partially offset by weak and volatile cash generation that undermines earnings quality. Valuation looks attractive on a low P/E, while recent financing and JV-related events add growth optionality but also raise dilution and contingent-risk considerations.

To see Spark’s full report on RNGE stock,
click here.

More about Range Impact

Range Impact, Inc., traded over the counter as RNGE, is a public company focused on acquiring, reclaiming and repurposing former industrial and mining properties across Appalachia into strategic infrastructure and high‑growth assets. Its redevelopment projects aim to support long‑term economic development, environmental stewardship and enhanced shareholder value by converting legacy sites into energy and digital infrastructure hubs.

C2 Ventures, LLC is an AI infrastructure development firm that builds platforms integrating power generation, hyperscale‑ready digital infrastructure and advanced computing to support artificial intelligence and energy‑intensive technologies. Through portfolio companies such as Time Complexity WV, it develops projects that combine energy, compute, engineering systems and long‑term capital to underpin the next generation of the digital economy.

data.description:

Diana Shipping ( (DSX) ) just unveiled an update.

Diana Shipping Inc., already the largest shareholder of Genco Shipping & Trading, has extended its tender offer to acquire all remaining Genco shares it does not own to July 10, 2026, from a prior deadline in late June. As of June 26, 2026, investors had tendered 10.6 million Genco shares, representing 28.4% of the outstanding float not held by Diana, underscoring notable investor interest in a potential combination.

The bid, recently enhanced in an offer to Genco’s board, values Genco at $27.34 per share through a mix of $24.80 in cash and one Diana share, supported by $1.433 billion in fully committed bank financing with no financing condition. The proposal, which represents a substantial premium to Genco’s undisturbed share price and net asset value, signals Diana’s push to consolidate its position in the dry bulk shipping market and raises the stakes for Genco’s board and shareholders as they weigh a premium offer amid strong sector asset values.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DSX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakening fundamentals versus prior-cycle peaks (contracting revenue, lower margins) and a levered balance sheet with low current returns, despite still-positive recent free cash flow. Technical signals also reflect weak near-term momentum. Positives from the latest earnings call—high utilization, meaningful 2026 charter coverage, and improved liquidity/deleveraging—provide some support, but valuation (high P/E with a modest yield) limits upside.

data.title: IM Cannabis Raises US$225,000 in Convertible Note and Warrant Financing
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

IM Cannabis Corp ( (IMCC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, IM Cannabis Corp. closed a US$225,000 private placement with an institutional investor via a convertible note carrying an 8% annual interest rate and a 10% original issue discount. The note is repayable only in common shares, with a conversion price tied to the lower of a fixed US$0.152 per share or a market-based formula, subject to a floor and a 4.99% ownership cap, and the company plans to use the US$202,500 in net proceeds for general corporate purposes.

In connection with the financing, IM Cannabis issued a warrant allowing the investor to buy up to 1,483,386 common shares at C$0.22, exercisable immediately and expiring in July 2031, with the securities subject to a four-month hold. The company also committed to reserve sufficient shares and file a resale registration statement with the U.S. SEC, underscoring its continued reliance on equity-linked financing to support operations amid regulatory, market and geopolitical risks in its core Israel and Germany markets.

Spark’s Take on IMCC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IMCC is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (recurring losses, negative equity, and a return to cash burn) and bearish technical conditions (price below all key moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation contributes little support because the negative P/E reflects ongoing unprofitability and no dividend yield is provided.

To see Spark’s full report on IMCC stock,
click here.

More about IM Cannabis Corp

IM Cannabis Corp. is a medical cannabis company operating in Israel and Germany, focused on building and scaling innovative, tech-enabled businesses across global markets. Through subsidiaries, it imports and distributes medical cannabis, runs retail pharmacies and online platforms in Israel, and supplies German pharmacies via Adjupharm GmbH for medical patients.

Average Trading Volume: 3,561,077

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.05M

data.title: Rio Tinto Updates Total Voting Rights and Share Capital Structure as of Late May 2026
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Rio Tinto Limited ( (AU:RIO) ) is now available.

Rio Tinto plc reported that, as of 29 May 2026, its issued share capital comprised 1,256,038,584 ordinary shares of 10p each, with 992,389 of these held in treasury and therefore excluded from dividends and voting. This left a total of 1,255,046,195 voting rights, a key reference figure for investors and other stakeholders monitoring disclosure thresholds under U.K. transparency rules.

The company also noted the existence of a Special Voting Share and a DLC Dividend Share that support joint voting and economic alignment between Rio Tinto plc and Rio Tinto Limited within their dual-listed structure. In addition, it highlighted that 371,821,214 publicly held Rio Tinto Limited shares remain outside the plc share capital, underscoring the scale and complexity of the group’s cross-market equity base and governance framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:RIO) stock is a Hold
with a A$171.50 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rio Tinto Limited stock,
see the AU:RIO Stock Forecast page.

More about Rio Tinto Limited

Rio Tinto Limited, part of the Anglo-Australian mining group Rio Tinto, operates in the global resources sector with a focus on iron ore, copper and other minerals critical to industrial and energy markets. The company is structured as part of a dual-listed companies arrangement with Rio Tinto plc, designed to align the economic interests and voting rights of shareholders across the U.K. and Australia.

Average Trading Volume: 1,292,176

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$235.3B

For an in-depth examination of RIO stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Actelis Restructures White Lion Financing with New Exchange
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Actelis Networks, Inc. ( (ASNS) ).

On April 10, 2026, Actelis Networks was delisted from the Nasdaq Capital Market, triggering a delisting-related pricing mechanism in its common stock purchase agreement with White Lion Capital. On July 1, 2026, the parties signed an Exchange and Amendment Agreement under which Actelis agreed to issue 9,850,000 shares and related warrant securities to compensate White Lion for rights tied to commitment shares and delisting penalties.

The amendment restructures White Lion’s purchase mechanisms into revised rapid and regular purchase options, setting discounted prices based on market trading with a fixed $0.005 deduction that does not adjust for any reverse stock split. Actelis also agreed to pause new purchase notices for 30 days and to reconfigure its registration statements to deregister 10,000,000 shares and newly register 6,000,000 shares plus the amendment securities, reshaping its financing flexibility while the stock remains off Nasdaq.

Spark’s Take on ASNS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ASNS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak profitability and sustained cash burn, despite improved leverage. Technicals also reflect a pronounced downtrend with negative momentum. Corporate events are mixed, with OTCQB trading and delisting-related risks offsetting potential strategic upside from the proposed acquisition and buyback expansion, while valuation metrics provided do not offer clear support.

To see Spark’s full report on ASNS stock,
click here.

More about Actelis Networks, Inc.

Actelis Networks, Inc. operates in the telecommunications and networking sector, providing solutions based on its common stock financing arrangements to support its capital needs. The company has previously relied on an equity line of credit structure with investor White Lion Capital LLC, tied to its listing status on the Nasdaq Capital Market and subsequent trading in its common stock.

Average Trading Volume: 1,601,558

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.96M

data.title: Intellinetics Shareholders Approve Expanded Equity and Governance Plans
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Intellinetics ( (INLX) ) has issued an update.

At its June 25, 2026 annual meeting, Intellinetics stockholders elected five directors to one-year terms and approved amendments to both the 2024 Equity Incentive Plan and the 2023 Non-Employee Director Compensation Plan, significantly increasing the number of shares available for issuance under each plan. Shareholders also backed, on an advisory basis, the compensation of named executive officers, supported holding say-on-pay votes every three years, and ratified the appointment of GBQ Partners LLC as the company’s independent registered public accounting firm for the 2026 fiscal year, reinforcing existing governance and compensation structures.

Spark’s Take on INLX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, INLX is a Neutral.

INLX scores in the lower-middle range primarily due to weakening financial performance (revenue decline and renewed losses) and bearish technical signals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). The score is partially supported by balance-sheet resilience and positive free cash flow, plus an earnings-call outlook that highlights stable SaaS revenue and guidance for double-digit SaaS growth, though near-term profitability and services weakness remain material risks.

To see Spark’s full report on INLX stock,
click here.

More about Intellinetics

Intellinetics Inc. operates in the technology sector, providing software-driven solutions that rely on equity-based compensation and director incentive structures to attract and retain talent. The company’s governance framework includes regular stockholder meetings to elect directors, approve compensation plans and policies, and ratify its independent public accounting firm, reflecting a focus on shareholder oversight and corporate accountability.

data.title: American Eagle Announces CFO Transition and Strategic Guidance
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

American Eagle ( (AEO) ) has shared an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, American Eagle Outfitters announced that longtime Chief Financial Officer Mike Mathias will step down from his executive roles and move into a full‑time, non‑executive strategic advisor position to CEO Jay Schottenstein, effective August 3, 2026. Mathias, who has spent 25 years with the company and became CFO in 2020, will work closely with his successor through the remainder of fiscal 2026 and continue advising Schottenstein until July 30, 2027.

The board appointed former Papa John’s and Nike finance executive Ravi Thanawala as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, effective August 3, 2026, under a comprehensive compensation and severance package designed to align his incentives with long‑term performance. By reaffirming its second‑quarter and full‑year 2026 guidance alongside the leadership change, AEO signaled confidence in operational momentum and sought to reassure investors that the CFO transition will be orderly and supportive of its strategic and financial objectives.

The most recent analyst rating on (AEO) stock is a Hold
with a $22.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Eagle stock,
see the AEO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AEO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AEO is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakened TTM cash flow generation/conversion and higher leverage despite better recent profitability. Offsetting these risks are a favorable valuation (low P/E with a dividend), a generally constructive earnings outlook driven by Aerie strength, and mixed-but-stabilizing technicals (positive near-term momentum, weaker long-term trend).

To see Spark’s full report on AEO stock,
click here.

More about American Eagle

American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. is a leading global specialty apparel retailer, trading on the NYSE under the ticker AEO. The company operates the American Eagle, Aerie, OFFL/NE by Aerie, Todd Snyder and Unsubscribed brands, focusing on casual, comfortable lifestyle clothing. It runs stores across the United States, Canada and Mexico, sells through license partners in more than 30 countries and supports its portfolio with a robust e‑commerce platform.

Rooted in themes of optimism, inclusivity and authenticity, AEO targets a broad consumer base seeking timeless outfitting and durable, high‑quality products. Its multi‑brand strategy and international footprint position the company as a significant player in youth‑focused and lifestyle apparel, with both brick‑and‑mortar and digital channels supporting growth and market reach.

Average Trading Volume: 5,309,808

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.88B

data.title: Kohl’s Extends Revolving Credit Facility, Enhances Liquidity
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Kohl’s ( (KSS) ) has issued an announcement.

On June 30, 2026, Kohl’s Corporation entered into a second amendment to its revolving credit facility with Wells Fargo Bank and other lenders, extending the facility’s maturity date by five years to June 30, 2031 and adjusting pricing terms for Base Rate and SOFR loans. The amendment also broadens the borrowing base to include eligible in-transit inventory up to 15% of total borrowing base value, revises the availability definition by deducting a debt maturity reserve, and makes other minor changes, refining Kohl’s liquidity structure and potentially enhancing its operational financing flexibility.

The updated pricing grid replaces prior availability breakpoints with a single 50% threshold, sets new applicable margins between 0.25% and 0.50% for Base Rate loans and 1.25% to 1.50% for SOFR loans, and removes a previous 0.10% SOFR credit spread adjustment, which may influence Kohl’s overall borrowing costs. Many of the participating banks, or their affiliates, have historically provided and may continue to provide various financial and commercial services to Kohl’s, reflecting ongoing relationships that support the retailer’s capital markets access and banking needs.

The most recent analyst rating on (KSS) stock is a Sell
with a $15.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kohl’s stock,
see the KSS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KSS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KSS is a Neutral.

The score reflects solid cash-flow strength and an attractive valuation as key positives, tempered by steep revenue contraction and elevated leverage. Technically, the stock is in an uptrend but looks overextended, while the latest earnings call reinforces a cautiously improving operational trajectory amid persistent sales and margin pressure.

To see Spark’s full report on KSS stock,
click here.

More about Kohl’s

Kohl’s Corporation is a U.S.-based department store retailer that operates a nationwide chain offering apparel, footwear, home goods, and related consumer products. The company focuses on value-oriented customers in the midmarket segment and relies on revolving credit facilities and other financing arrangements to support inventory, working capital needs, and ongoing operations.

Average Trading Volume: 5,185,268

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $2.01B
